# Load the quranic_verses.json file from the given path and search for verses containing the substring
import json, os, sys, re

path = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    data = json.load(f)

# examine sample entries count
len(data), type(data[0]) if data else None

# show keys and an example entry
data[0]

# Define normalization function
import unicodedata, re

arabic_tashkeel = ''.join([chr(x) for x in range(0x0610, 0x061A)]) + ''.join([chr(x) for x in range(0x064B, 0x0653)]) + ''.join([chr(x) for x in range(0x0654, 0x0657)]) # approximate
#But better define common diacritics
tashkeel_chars = '[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0653\u0654\u0655\u0670]'
# We'll remove tatweel, punctuation, and unify hamza forms
def normalize_ar(text):
    # Normalize Unicode
    text = unicodedata.normalize('NFC', text)
    # Remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('\u0640','')
    # Remove tashkeel
    text = re.sub(tashkeel_chars, '', text)
    # Replace different hamza forms with bare hamza 'ء' (U+0621)
    # But many forms: أ إ آ ؤ ئ 
    text = text.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    # remove punctuation and non letters
    text = re.sub(r'[^\u0621-\u063A\u0641-\u064A0-9 ]+', ' ', text)
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    text = text.lower()
    return text

# Normalize all ayah_texts
norm_map = {}
for i, entry in enumerate(data):
    ay = entry.get('ayah_text','')
    norm_map[i] = normalize_ar(ay)

# Search for the normalized version of Original_Span FULL
orig_span = "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْر"
norm_orig = normalize_ar(orig_span)
norm_orig[:100], norm_orig

# Compute similarity measures between candidate and original substring
def token_f1(a, b):
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    set_a = ta
    set_b = tb
    # count overlaps (multiset)
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    overlap = sum(min(ca[t], cb.get(t,0)) for t in ca)
    if len(ta)==0 or len(tb)==0:
        return 0.0, overlap, len(ta), len(tb)
    prec = overlap/len(ta)
    rec = overlap/len(tb)
    if prec+rec==0:
        f1=0.0
    else:
        f1=2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return f1, overlap, len(ta), len(tb)

candidate = data[4645]['ayah_text']
norm_candidate = normalize_ar(candidate)
norm_orig = normalize_ar(orig_span)

token_f1(norm_candidate, norm_orig), norm_candidate, norm_orig

import difflib
s1 = norm_candidate
s2 = norm_orig
difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, s1, s2).ratio()

# Search for exact Arabic substring in DB entries (case-sensitive)
orig_full = "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْر"
results = []
for i, entry in enumerate(data):
    if orig_full in entry.get('ayah_text',''):
        results.append((i, entry))
len(results), results[:5]
